message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #999999
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EEEEEE
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

participant FragmentVideoChat as FVC
participant LicodeConnector as LC
participant PeerConnectionFactory as PCF
participant RoomObserver as RO
participant MediaStream as MS
participant PeerConnection as PC
participant StreamDescription as SD
participant LicodeSdpObserver as LSO
participant LicodeServer as LS
participant SocketIOClient as SIO

== Init ==
FVC -> LC : init
LC -> PCF : initializeAndroidGlobals
FVC -> LC : addObserver(RoomObserver)

== Publish ==
FVC -> FVC : startCastView.onClick
FVC -> LC : requestPublish
LC -> LC : triggerPublishAllowed
LC --> FVC : onPublishAllowed
FVC -> FVC : startPublish
FVC -> FVC : makeVideoView
FVC -> LC : publish(VideoStreamsView)
LC -> LC : doPublish

== Publish - create media ==
LC -> PCF : createLocalMediaStream
LC <-- PCF : createMediaConstraints
LC -> PCF : getVideoCapturer
LC -> PCF : createVideoSource(VideoCapturer, MediaConstraints)
LC -> PCF : createVideoTrack(String, VideoSource)
LC -> LC : addTrack
LC -> PCF : createAudioSource(MediaConstraints)
LC -> PCF : createAudioTrack(String, AudioSource)
LC -> LC : addTrack

== Publish - create offer ==
LC <-- LC : makePcConstraints
LC <-- LC : create MyPcObserver
LC -> PCF : createPeerConnection(List<LicodeServer>, MediaConstraints, Observer)
LC -> MS : addStream(MediaStream, MediaConstraints)
LC -> MS : setMedia
LC -> MS : attachRenderer
LC -> MS : initLocal(PeerConnection, SdpObserver)

PC -> LSO : createOffer
LSO --> PC : onCreateSuccess
PC -> SD : setLocalDescription
SD --> PC : onSetSuccess
PC -> LS : sendLocalDescription
LS <-- PC : sendSDPSocket("publish")
LS -> SIO : publish
SIO --> LS : publish success
LS -> PC : setRemoteDescription

== Subscribe ==
== Subscribe - token ==
FVC -> LC : startVideoChat
FVC -> LC : createToken
FVC -> LC : load
FVC -> LC : load Balance
LC --> FVC : createToken success
FVC -> LC : connect
LC -> LC : createToken
LC -> LC : decodeToken
LC -> LS : connect to server
LS -> SIO : socket
SIO --> LC : onConnectCompleted

== Subscribe - listen socket events ==
LC -> LC : listen events\nonAddStream\nonSubscribeP2P\nonPublishP2P\nonDataStream\nonRemoveStream\ndisconnect
LC -> SIO : sendMessageSocket("token")
SIO --> LC : token success
LC --> FVC : onRoomConnected
FVC -> LC : setBandwidthLimits

alt has streams
  LC -> LC : triggerStreamAdded
  LC --> FVC : onAddStream
  LC -> LC : triggerStreamAdded
end

FVC --> LC : onStreamAdded
FVC -> LC : subscribe
LC -> LC : doSubscribe
LC -> LC : triggerMediaAvailable
LC --> FVC : onStreamMediaAvailable
FVC -> FVC : makeVideoView
FVC -> LC : attachRenderer

LC -> MS : attachRenderer
LC <-- LC : create MyPcObserver
LC -> PCF : createPeerConnection
LC -> MS : initRemote(PeerConnection, SdpObserver)

PC -> LSO : createOffer
LSO --> PC : onCreateSuccess
PC -> SD : setLocalDescription
SD --> PC : onSetSuccess
PC -> LS : sendLocalDescription
LS <-- PC : sendSDPSocket("subscribe")
LS -> SIO : subscribe success
LS -> PC : setRemoteDescription

@enduml
